title: Transfer ActionHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the actionHook when a transfer verb resolves. Extends the base callback payload with transfer-specific outcome fields.

transfer_result.description: Outcome of the transfer: 'bridged' means the destination answered and the call was connected; 'returned' means the call was handed back to the caller flow; 'voicemail' means the caller was routed to voicemail; 'failed' means a protocol-level error occurred.

transfer_reason.description: Why the transfer ended with its result: 'completed' means it ran to completion; 'no-answer' means the destination did not answer in time; 'busy' means the destination returned a busy response; 'declined' means the confirm gate or AMD rejected the call; 'caller-abandoned' means the caller hung up before bridging; 'error' means a protocol-level failure occurred.

dial_call_sid.description: Call SID of the destination (human) leg, when one was created during the transfer attempt.

sip_status.description: SIP status code from the destination leg, when applicable (e.g. 200, 486, 487).
